name: Homemade Buttermilk Pancake & Waffle Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until evenly distributed.
3. Pour into a 12-cup container with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Seal the container.
5. Label with date and contents.
6. Store in a cool, dry place.
7. Use within 6 months.
Makes about 10 1/2 cups of Homemade Buttermilk Pancake & Waffle Mix.
